facts: Client operates a demo health SaaS platform.
The initial transcript requested a legal package for platform launch.
A later review transcript requested corrections and additional software/IP documents.
preferences: Keep Google Workspace as the visible office layer.
Do not mark anything signature-ready until Senior Review clears blockers.
risks: Missing tax and representative data blocks signature.
Privacy notice requires confirmation of sensitive health data categories.
